title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
